name: Q Dungeon
short_description: It’s a simple dungeon exploration card game featuring a first-person perspective as players venture through caves, charming chibi-style monsters, and a large collection of cards. Players need to form sets of three cards totaling a multiple of 10 to launch an attack.
detailed_description:
Currently in the EA phase, our game has relatively few bugs. However, the card stats are not yet fully balanced. We warmly welcome everyone to provide feedback and suggestions!

Introduction:

  • Card Game Mechanics

    • Featuring over 100 unique cards, which can be merged and upgraded.

    • The gameplay combines elements of a traditional card game with a "Dou Niu" (Bullfighting) twist. Players need to form sets of three cards totaling a multiple of 10 to launch an attack.

  • Randomized Dungeon Exploration

    • Procedurally generated caves filled with enemies and treasure chests, ensuring a fresh experience every run.

  • Dynamic Cave Progression

    • A forward-progression system that challenges players to dodge thorny traps while collecting coins, enhancing immersion.

  • Adorable Monster Designs

    • Enemies are styled with a cute and casual chibi aesthetic, providing a lighthearted experience.

  • Rescue the Princess

    • The brave prince embarks on a perilous journey to rescue the princess from a fearsome dragon. Legend has it that only by reaching the deepest depths of the dungeon can the prince hope to save her.
